title: Resolution of the Case. After notice and hearing, the Adjudicator shall
content: 37 submit his/her findings and recommendations to the Regional Director in the form of a 38 draft Order. The Regional Director shall render a decision after receipt of the findings and 39 recommendations. 40 41 42 Appeal and Execution of Judgment 43 44
